summary: Great‑sounding recording of a solid Red Rocks show
review: The reviewer praises the audio, saying the recording sounds great, and notes that the performance was “pretty cool.” While no specific songs or moments are called out, the positive tone suggests an enjoyable concert capture.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 4‑star review; both recording and performance are described positively, leading to a solid but not exceptional rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer says the recording sounds great, indicating clear and pleasant audio quality.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Show described as “pretty cool,” but no detailed comments on pacing or song transitions.
